description_long: This is a rectangular juice carton with a predominantly yellow and beige color scheme, featuring a screw cap on the top. The front of the carton displays a large illustration of a pear and an apple, indicating the juice flavor, along with a green circular badge that reads '100% fruit.' The lower front section has a blue and white logo and the text 'ÄPPLE & PÄRONJUICE 2L.' The sides of the carton are similarly decorated, while the back is plain and unmarked. The cap is positioned at one corner of the top, typical for juice cartons, and the overall surface appears to be made of laminated cardboard. The packaging is designed for easy pouring and storage, suitable for placement in urban environments such as convenience stores, cafes, or picnic areas.
description: A yellow-beige rectangular juice carton with a screw cap, featuring apple and pear illustrations and '100% fruit' labeling.
description_view_0: Front view showing the apple and pear illustration, '100% fruit' badge, and product label.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the screw cap and the front label with fruit illustrations.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the plain, unmarked back of the carton.
description_view_3: Opposite angled view with the screw cap visible and the front label partially shown.
